sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value UInt32, str_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, bitRotateRight(value, 1) AS rotated_value FROM test_table WHERE multiIf(str_value LIKE 'Test%', 'Valid', 'Invalid') = 'Valid' AND id < 4;
SELECT id, multiIf(value IS NULL, 0, bitRotateRight(value, 1)) AS adjusted_value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value >= 15);
SELECT id, bitRotateRight(max(value), 2) AS max_rotated FROM (SELECT id, max(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY id) AS subquery WHERE id > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value, multiIf(value > 20, 'High', 'Low') AS value_category FROM test_table WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, multiIf(value_category = 'High', bitRotateRight(value, 2), bitRotateRight(value, 1)) AS adjusted_rotation FROM temp_table WHERE value_category IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bitRotateRight(value, IF(value IS NULL, 0, 1)) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE id > 0 ORDER BY id DESC) AS ordered WHERE id < 3;
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT id + 5, bitRotateRight(value, 1), str_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, multiIf(value % 3 = 0, 'Divisible by 3', 'Not Divisible') AS divisibility FROM test_table HAVING divisibility = 'Divisible by 3';
